mapper.select: SELECT vc.id, vc.section, vc.title, vc.body, vc.file_group_id, f.file_url AS image_url, vc.sort_order, vc.published_yn, vc.updated_at FROM village_content vc LEFT JOIN files f ON f.file_group_id = vc.file_group_id AND f.is_main_yn = 'Y' AND f.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE vc.published_yn = 'Y' AND vc.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY vc.sort_order, vc.section

SELECT vc.id, vc.section, vc.title, vc.body, vc.file_group_id, f.file_url AS image_url, vc.sort_order, vc.published_yn, vc.updated_at FROM village_content vc LEFT JOIN files f ON f.file_group_id = vc.file_group_id AND f.is_main_yn = 'Y' AND f.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE vc.published_yn = 'Y' AND vc.section = #{section} AND vc.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY vc.sort_order

SELECT vc.id, vc.section, vc.title, vc.body, vc.file_group_id, f.file_url AS image_url, vc.sort_order, vc.published_yn, vc.updated_at FROM village_content vc LEFT JOIN files f ON f.file_group_id = vc.file_group_id AND f.is_main_yn = 'Y' AND f.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE vc.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY vc.section, vc.sort_order

SELECT vc.id, vc.section, vc.title, vc.body, vc.file_group_id, f.file_url AS image_url, vc.sort_order, vc.published_yn, vc.updated_at FROM village_content vc LEFT JOIN files f ON f.file_group_id = vc.file_group_id AND f.is_main_yn = 'Y' AND f.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE vc.id = #{id} AND vc.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO village_content (section, title, body, file_group_id, sort_order, published_yn) VALUES (#{section}, #{title}, #{body}, #{fileGroupId}, #{sortOrder}, #{publishedYn}) RETURNING id, section, title, body, file_group_id, sort_order, published_yn, updated_at
mapper.update: UPDATE village_content SET section = COALESCE(#{section}, section), title = COALESCE(#{title}, title), body = COALESCE(#{body}, body), file_group_id = COALESCE(#{fileGroupId}, file_group_id), sort_order = COALESCE(#{sortOrder}, sort_order), published_yn = COALESCE(#{publishedYn}, published_yn), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL RETURNING id, section, title, body, file_group_id, sort_order, published_yn, updated_at
